import { prisma } from "../../lib/prisma";
import { generateTokenPair, verifyRefreshToken } from "../../lib/jwt";
import { slugify } from "@audira/shared";
import { logger } from "../../lib/logger";
import { emailService } from "../../lib/email";
import type { LoginInput, RegisterInput, TokenPayload } from "@audira/shared";

export class AuthService {
  /**
   * Register a new user and create their workspace
   */
  async register(input: RegisterInput) {
    const { name, email, password, tenantName } = input;

    const existing = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email } });
    if (existing) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error("Email already registered"), { statusCode: 409 });
    }

    const passwordHash = await Bun.password.hash(password, { algorithm: "bcrypt", cost: 12 });

    const result = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
      const user = await tx.user.create({
        data: { name, email, passwordHash, emailVerified: false },
      });

      const tenant = await tx.tenant.create({
        data: { name: tenantName, slug: slugify(tenantName) + "-" + Date.now().toString(36) },
      });

      await tx.tenantMember.create({
        data: { tenantId: tenant.id, userId: user.id, role: "OWNER" },
      });

      await tx.subscription.create({
        data: { tenantId: tenant.id, plan: "FREE", status: "active" },
      });

      return { user, tenant };
    });

    const payload: TokenPayload = {
      userId: result.user.id,
      email: result.user.email,
      tenantId: result.tenant.id,
      role: "OWNER",
    };

    const tokens = generateTokenPair(payload);

    await prisma.userSession.create({
      data: {
        userId: result.user.id,
        token: tokens.accessToken,
        refreshToken: tokens.refreshToken,
        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
      },
    });

    return {
      user: { id: result.user.id, name: result.user.name, email: result.user.email },
      tenant: { id: result.tenant.id, name: result.tenant.name, slug: result.tenant.slug },
      ...tokens,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Login with email and password
   */
  async login(input: LoginInput) {
    const { email, password } = input;

    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { email },
      include: { memberships: { include: { tenant: true }, take: 1 } },
    });

    if (!user || !user.passwordHash) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error("Invalid credentials"), { statusCode: 401 });
    }

    const valid = await Bun.password.verify(password, user.passwordHash);
    if (!valid) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error("Invalid credentials"), { statusCode: 401 });
    }

    const membership = user.memberships[0];
    if (!membership) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error("No workspace found"), { statusCode: 404 });
    }

    const payload: TokenPayload = {
      userId: user.id,
      email: user.email,
      tenantId: membership.tenantId,
      role: membership.role,
    };

    const tokens = generateTokenPair(payload);

    await prisma.userSession.create({
      data: {
        userId: user.id,
        token: tokens.accessToken,
        refreshToken: tokens.refreshToken,
        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
      },
    });

    await prisma.user.update({ where: { id: user.id }, data: { lastLoginAt: new Date() } });

    return {
      user: { id: user.id, name: user.name, email: user.email, avatar: user.avatar },
      tenant: { id: membership.tenant.id, name: membership.tenant.name, slug: membership.tenant.slug },
      role: membership.role,
      ...tokens,
    };
  }

  async refreshToken(refreshToken: string) {
    const payload = verifyRefreshToken(refreshToken);
    const session = await prisma.userSession.findUnique({ where: { refreshToken } });
    if (!session) throw Object.assign(new Error("Invalid refresh token"), { statusCode: 401 });

    const newPayload: TokenPayload = { userId: payload.userId, email: payload.email, tenantId: payload.tenantId, role: payload.role };
    const tokens = generateTokenPair(newPayload);

    await prisma.userSession.update({
      where: { id: session.id },
      data: { token: tokens.accessToken, refreshToken: tokens.refreshToken, expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000) },
    });

    return tokens;
  }

  /**
   * Request password reset - generates token and sends email
   */
  async forgotPassword(email: string, resetUrl: string) {
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email } });
    if (!user) {
      // Don't reveal if email exists for security
      logger.info("Password reset requested for non-existent email", { email });
      return;
    }

    // Generate reset token (32 random bytes as hex)
    const resetToken = await Bun.password.hash(Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15) + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15), {
      algorithm: "bcrypt",
      cost: 10,
    });

    // Store token in database with 1 hour expiration
    await prisma.passwordResetToken.create({
      data: {
        userId: user.id,
        token: resetToken,
        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 60 * 60 * 1000), // 1 hour
      },
    });

    // Send password reset email
    try {
      await emailService.sendPasswordResetEmail(user.email, resetToken, resetUrl);
      logger.info("Password reset email sent", { email: user.email });
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error("Failed to send password reset email", { email: user.email, error });
      // Don't throw - user should still be able to retry
    }
  }

  /**
   * Reset password with token
   */
  async resetPassword(token: string, newPassword: string) {
    // Find valid reset token
    const resetToken = await prisma.passwordResetToken.findUnique({
      where: { token },
      include: { user: true },
    });

    if (!resetToken || resetToken.expiresAt < new Date()) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error("Invalid or expired reset token"), { statusCode: 400 });
    }

    // Hash new password
    const passwordHash = await Bun.password.hash(newPassword, { algorithm: "bcrypt", cost: 12 });

    // Update password and delete all reset tokens
    await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
      await tx.user.update({
        where: { id: resetToken.userId },
        data: { passwordHash },
      });

      // Delete all reset tokens for this user
      await tx.passwordResetToken.deleteMany({
        where: { userId: resetToken.userId },
      });

      // Delete all sessions to force re-login
      await tx.userSession.deleteMany({
        where: { userId: resetToken.userId },
      });
    });

    logger.info("Password reset successful", { userId: resetToken.userId });
  }

  async logout(token: string) {
    await prisma.userSession.deleteMany({ where: { token } });
  }
}

import type { MiddlewareHandler } from "hono";
import { verify } from "jsonwebtoken";
import type { TokenPayload } from "@audira/shared";
import { prisma } from "../lib/prisma";

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET;

if (!JWT_SECRET) {
  throw new Error(
    "JWT_SECRET environment variable is required. Set it in your .env file."
  );
}

/**
 * Middleware to verify JWT token and attach user to context
 */
export const authMiddleware: MiddlewareHandler = async (c, next) => {
  const authHeader = c.req.header("Authorization");

  if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith("Bearer ")) {
    return c.json({ success: false, error: "Unauthorized" }, 401);
  }

  const token = authHeader.replace("Bearer ", "");

  try {
    const payload = verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as TokenPayload;

    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { id: payload.userId },
      select: {
        id: true,
        email: true,
        name: true,
        avatar: true,
      },
    });

    if (!user) {
      return c.json({ success: false, error: "User not found" }, 401);
    }

    c.set("user", user);
    c.set("userId", payload.userId);
    c.set("tenantId", payload.tenantId);
    c.set("role", payload.role);

    await next();
  } catch {
    return c.json({ success: false, error: "Invalid or expired token" }, 401);
  }
};

/**
 * Middleware to check user role
 */
export const requireRole = (...roles: string[]): MiddlewareHandler => {
  return async (c, next) => {
    const role = c.get("role");
    if (!roles.includes(role)) {
      return c.json({ success: false, error: "Insufficient permissions" }, 403);
    }
    await next();
  };
};

/**
 * Middleware to ensure tenant context
 */
export const requireTenant: MiddlewareHandler = async (c, next) => {
  const tenantId = c.get("tenantId");
  if (!tenantId) {
    return c.json({ success: false, error: "Tenant context required" }, 400);
  }
  await next();
};

</content>
</file>

import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
import type { TokenPayload } from "@audira/shared";

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || "fallback-secret";
const JWT_REFRESH_SECRET = process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET || "fallback-refresh-secret";
const JWT_EXPIRES_IN = process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || "15m";
const JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN = process.env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN || "7d";

export function generateAccessToken(payload: TokenPayload): string {
  return jwt.sign(payload, JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: JWT_EXPIRES_IN });
}

export function generateRefreshToken(payload: TokenPayload): string {
  return jwt.sign(payload, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, {
    expiresIn: JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN,
  });
}

export function verifyAccessToken(token: string): TokenPayload {
  return jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as TokenPayload;
}

export function verifyRefreshToken(token: string): TokenPayload {
  return jwt.verify(token, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET) as TokenPayload;
}

export function generateTokenPair(payload: TokenPayload) {
  return {
    accessToken: generateAccessToken(payload),
    refreshToken: generateRefreshToken(payload),
    expiresIn: JWT_EXPIRES_IN,
  };
}

import { Hono } from "hono";
import { zValidator } from "@hono/zod-validator";
import { loginSchema, registerSchema } from "@audira/shared";
import { AuthService } from "./service";

export const authRoutes = new Hono();

const authService = new AuthService();

// POST /auth/register
authRoutes.post("/register", zValidator("json", registerSchema), async (c) => {
  const body = c.req.valid("json");
  const result = await authService.register(body);
  return c.json({ success: true, data: result }, 201);
});

// POST /auth/login
authRoutes.post("/login", zValidator("json", loginSchema), async (c) => {
  const body = c.req.valid("json");
  const result = await authService.login(body);
  return c.json({ success: true, data: result });
});

// POST /auth/refresh
authRoutes.post("/refresh", async (c) => {
  const { refreshToken } = await c.req.json();
  if (!refreshToken) {
    return c.json({ success: false, error: "Refresh token required" }, 400);
  }
  const result = await authService.refreshToken(refreshToken);
  return c.json({ success: true, data: result });
});

// POST /auth/forgot-password
authRoutes.post("/forgot-password", async (c) => {
  const { email } = await c.req.json();
  await authService.forgotPassword(email);
  return c.json({ success: true, message: "Reset email sent if account exists" });
});

// POST /auth/logout
authRoutes.post("/logout", async (c) => {
  const authHeader = c.req.header("Authorization");
  if (authHeader) {
    const token = authHeader.replace("Bearer ", "");
    await authService.logout(token);
  }
  return c.json({ success: true, message: "Logged out" });
});

// ============ 2FA ============

// POST /auth/2fa/setup - Generate 2FA secret
authRoutes.post("/2fa/setup", async (c) => {
  // Generate a random base32 secret
  const chars = "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ234567";
  let secret = "";
  for (let i = 0; i < 16; i++) {
    secret += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
  }

  // In production, save this to user record and generate proper TOTP QR
  const otpauthUrl = `otpauth://totp/Audira:user@audira.ai?secret=${secret}&issuer=Audira`;

  return c.json({
    success: true,
    data: { secret, otpauthUrl },
  });
});

// POST /auth/2fa/verify - Verify 2FA code and enable
authRoutes.post("/2fa/verify", async (c) => {
  const { code } = await c.req.json();

  if (!code || code.length !== 6) {
    return c.json({ success: false, error: "Invalid code" }, 400);
  }

  // In production, verify TOTP code against stored secret
  // For demo, accept any 6-digit code
  const backupCodes = Array.from({ length: 5 }, () => {
    const chars = "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789";
    let code = "";
    for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
      if (i === 4) code += "-";
      code += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
    }
    return code;
  });

  return c.json({
    success: true,
    data: { enabled: true, backupCodes },
    message: "2FA enabled successfully",
  });
});

// POST /auth/2fa/disable
authRoutes.post("/2fa/disable", async (c) => {
  // In production, verify password before disabling
  return c.json({ success: true, message: "2FA disabled" });
});

input.text:
# Bugfix Spec: Authentication Login Loop Bug

## Executive Summary

**Bug Description:** Setiap kali pengguna berhasil login, mereka langsung diminta login lagi.

**Root Cause:** Mismatch antara format penyimpanan token di localStorage dan cara pengambilannya, dikombinasikan dengan race condition pada inisialisasi Zustand store.

**Impact:** Users tidak dapat mengakses dashboard setelah login berhasil.

---

## 1. REQUIREMENTS

### 1.1 Bug Condition Analysis

**Kondisi yang Menyebabkan Bug:**

1. **Token Storage Mismatch**
   - Login page menyimpan token dengan 2 format berbeda:
     - Format Zustand: `audira-auth` → `{ state: { accessToken, ... }, version: 0 }`
     - Format Custom: `audira-session` → `{ user, tenant, accessToken, ... }`
   - API client hanya membaca dari `audira-auth` dengan path `parsed.state?.accessToken`
   - Jika Zustand store belum ter-hydrate, `accessToken` akan undefined

2. **Race Condition pada Hydration**
   - AuthGuard memeriksa localStorage sebelum Zustand store ter-hydrate
   - Zustand persist middleware memerlukan waktu untuk membaca localStorage
   - Jika router.push("/dashboard") terjadi sebelum hydration selesai, store masih kosong
   - API requests tanpa token → 401 Unauthorized → redirect ke login

3. **Token Expiry Tidak Ditangani**
   - Access token memiliki expiry 15 menit
   - Tidak ada automatic token refresh mechanism
   - Ketika token expired, API mengembalikan 401
   - API client redirect ke login tanpa mencoba refresh token

4. **Session Validation Inconsistency**
   - Backend menyimpan session di database (`userSession` table)
   - Frontend hanya memeriksa localStorage
   - Jika session di database dihapus/expired, frontend masih menganggap user authenticated

### 1.2 Acceptance Criteria

**AC1: Token Persistence**
- [ ] Token harus disimpan dengan format konsisten di localStorage
- [ ] Token harus dapat diambil dengan benar sebelum dan sesudah page refresh
- [ ] Zustand store harus ter-hydrate sebelum AuthGuard melakukan redirect

**AC2: Session Validation**
- [ ] AuthGuard harus menunggu Zustand store ter-hydrate sebelum render children
- [ ] API client harus selalu memiliki token yang valid saat membuat request
- [ ] Jika token expired, client harus mencoba refresh sebelum redirect ke login

**AC3: Token Refresh**
- [ ] Ketika access token expired, client harus otomatis refresh menggunakan refresh token
- [ ] Refresh token harus disimpan dengan aman
- [ ] Jika refresh token juga expired, user harus di-redirect ke login

**AC4: Logout Consistency**
- [ ] Logout harus menghapus token dari localStorage dan Zustand store
- [ ] Logout harus menghapus session dari backend
- [ ] Setelah logout, user tidak boleh bisa mengakses protected routes

**AC5: Error Handling**
- [ ] 401 Unauthorized harus ditangani dengan graceful
- [ ] User harus mendapat feedback yang jelas jika session expired
- [ ] Network errors tidak boleh menyebabkan infinite redirect loop

---

## 2. DESIGN

### 2.1 Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     Frontend (Next.js)                       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                               │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ Login Page                                           │   │
│  │ - POST /auth/login                                   │   │
│  │ - Save token to localStorage (unified format)        │   │
│  │ - Update Zustand store via setAuth()                 │   │
│  │ - router.push("/dashboard")                          │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                           ↓                                   │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ AuthGuard (with Hydration Check)                     │   │
│  │ - Wait for Zustand store hydration                   │   │
│  │ - Check isAuthenticated flag                         │   │
│  │ - Redirect to /login if not authenticated            │   │
│  │ - Render children only when ready                    │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                           ↓                                   │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ API Client (with Token Management)                   │   │
│  │ - Get token from Zustand store (not localStorage)    │   │
│  │ - Add Authorization header                           │   │
│  │ - Handle 401: attempt refresh token                  │   │
│  │ - Handle refresh failure: redirect to login          │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                           ↓                                   │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ Protected Routes (Dashboard, etc.)                   │   │
│  │ - Render only if authenticated                       │   │
│  │ - Make API requests with valid token                 │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                           ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     Backend (Hono)                           │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                               │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ Auth Routes                                          │   │
│  │ - POST /auth/login → generate token pair             │   │
│  │ - POST /auth/refresh → validate & refresh token      │   │
│  │ - POST /auth/logout → invalidate session             │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                           ↓                                   │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ Auth Middleware                                      │   │
│  │ - Verify JWT token                                   │   │
│  │ - Attach user context                                │   │
│  │ - Return 401 if invalid/expired                      │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                           ↓                                   │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ Protected Routes                                     │   │
│  │ - Require authMiddleware                             │   │
│  │ - Access user context from middleware                │   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2.2 Token Management Flow

**Login Flow:**
```
1. User submits login form
2. Frontend POST /auth/login with credentials
3. Backend validates credentials, generates token pair
4. Backend stores session in database
5. Backend returns { accessToken, refreshToken, user, tenant }
6. Frontend saves to Zustand store (which persists to localStorage)
7. Frontend redirects to /dashboard
8. AuthGuard waits for hydration, then renders dashboard
9. Dashboard makes API requests with accessToken
```

**Token Refresh Flow:**
```
1. API client makes request with accessToken
2. Backend returns 401 (token expired)
3. API client catches 401, attempts refresh
4. API client POST /auth/refresh with refreshToken
5. Backend validates refreshToken, generates new token pair
6. Backend updates session in database
7. Backend returns new { accessToken, refreshToken }
8. Frontend updates Zustand store with new tokens
9. API client retries original request with new accessToken
10. If refresh fails (401), redirect to login
```

**Logout Flow:**
```
1. User clicks logout
2. Frontend calls secureLogout() from Zustand store
3. Frontend clears localStorage, Zustand store, Tauri cache
4. Frontend POST /auth/logout with current token (optional)
5. Backend invalidates session in database
6. Frontend redirects to /login
```

### 2.3 Data Structure

**Unified Token Storage Format (localStorage):**
```json
{
  "state": {
    "user": {
      "id": "user-123",
      "name": "John Doe",
      "email": "john@example.com",
      "avatar": "https://...",
      "role": "OWNER"
    },
    "tenant": {
      "id": "tenant-123",
      "name": "My Workspace",
      "slug": "my-workspace"
    },
    "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "isAuthenticated": true
  },
  "version": 0
}
```

**API Request Header:**
```
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
```

**Backend Session Table:**
```sql
CREATE TABLE user_session (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  userId UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES user(id),
  token TEXT NOT NULL,
  refreshToken TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
```

### 2.4 Error Handling Strategy

**401 Unauthorized:**
- If access token expired: attempt refresh
- If refresh token expired: redirect to login
- If user not found: redirect to login
- If session invalid: redirect to login

**Network Errors:**
- Don't redirect immediately
- Show error message to user
- Allow retry
- Only redirect after multiple failures

**Hydration Issues:**
- AuthGuard waits for Zustand hydration
- Show loading spinner during hydration
- Timeout after 5 seconds (fallback to login)

---

## 3. IMPLEMENTATION TASKS

### Phase 1: Fix Token Storage & Retrieval (Critical)

#### Task 1.1: Unify Token Storage Format
**File:** `/apps/web/src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`

**Changes:**
- Remove dual storage (audira-auth + audira-session)
- Use only Zustand persist format via `useAuthStore.setAuth()`
- Remove manual localStorage.setItem calls
- Ensure token is stored in correct Zustand format

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Login page uses only `useAuthStore.setAuth()` to save tokens
- [ ] localStorage contains only `audira-auth` key after login
- [ ] Token format matches Zustand persist structure
- [ ] No manual localStorage manipulation in login page

---

#### Task 1.2: Fix API Client Token Retrieval
**File:** `/apps/web/src/lib/api.ts`

**Changes:**
- Change token retrieval from localStorage to Zustand store
- Use `useAuthStore.getState().accessToken` instead of parsing localStorage
- Add fallback to localStorage for backward compatibility (during migration)
- Add token validation before making requests

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] API client retrieves token from Zustand store
- [ ] Token is validated before adding to request header
- [ ] Fallback to localStorage works during migration
- [ ] No token = no Authorization header (not empty string)

---

#### Task 1.3: Fix AuthGuard Hydration
**File:** `/apps/web/src/components/layout/auth-guard.tsx`

**Changes:**
- Wait for Zustand store hydration before checking auth status
- Use `useAuthStore.getState().isAuthenticated` instead of localStorage check
- Add hydration state tracking
- Add timeout fallback (5 seconds)
- Show loading spinner during hydration

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] AuthGuard waits for Zustand hydration
- [ ] Loading spinner shown during hydration
- [ ] Redirect only after hydration complete
- [ ] Timeout fallback works (redirect to login after 5s)
- [ ] No race condition between hydration and redirect

---

### Phase 2: Implement Token Refresh (Important)

#### Task 2.1: Add Token Refresh Logic to API Client
**File:** `/apps/web/src/lib/api.ts`

**Changes:**
- Detect 401 responses
- Attempt to refresh token using refresh token
- Retry original request with new token
- Handle refresh failure (redirect to login)
- Prevent infinite refresh loops

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 401 response triggers refresh attempt
- [ ] Refresh uses refreshToken from Zustand store
- [ ] Original request retried with new token
- [ ] Refresh failure redirects to login
- [ ] No infinite loops on repeated 401s

---

#### Task 2.2: Add Refresh Token Endpoint Handler
**File:** `/apps/api/src/modules/auth/routes.ts`

**Changes:**
- Ensure `/auth/refresh` endpoint validates refresh token
- Generates new token pair
- Updates session in database
- Returns new tokens

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Refresh endpoint validates refresh token signature
- [ ] Refresh endpoint checks session exists in database
- [ ] New token pair generated with correct expiry
- [ ] Session updated in database
- [ ] Returns { accessToken, refreshToken }

---

#### Task 2.3: Update Zustand Store with Refresh Handler
**File:** `/apps/web/src/stores/auth-store.ts`

**Changes:**
- Add `refreshTokens()` method
- Call API refresh endpoint
- Update store with new tokens
- Handle refresh failure

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `refreshTokens()` method exists
- [ ] Calls `/auth/refresh` endpoint
- [ ] Updates store with new tokens
- [ ] Returns success/failure status
- [ ] Handles errors gracefully

---

### Phase 3: Improve Session Validation (Important)

#### Task 3.1: Add Session Validation on App Load
**File:** `/apps/web/src/components/layout/auth-guard.tsx`

**Changes:**
- On app load, validate session with backend
- Call `/auth/me` or similar endpoint
- If invalid, clear auth state and redirect to login
- Handle network errors gracefully

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Session validated on app load
- [ ] Invalid session clears auth state
- [ ] Network errors don't cause redirect
- [ ] User data updated from backend

---

#### Task 3.2: Add Session Validation Endpoint
**File:** `/apps/api/src/modules/auth/routes.ts`

**Changes:**
- Add `GET /auth/me` endpoint
- Requires authMiddleware
- Returns current user and tenant info
- Validates session in database

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Endpoint requires valid JWT token
- [ ] Returns user and tenant info
- [ ] Validates session exists in database
- [ ] Returns 401 if session invalid

---

### Phase 4: Improve Error Handling & UX (Nice to Have)

#### Task 4.1: Add Session Expiry Notification
**File:** `/apps/web/src/components/layout/auth-guard.tsx` or new component

**Changes:**
- Detect when token is about to expire
- Show notification to user
- Offer to refresh or logout
- Auto-refresh if user is active

**Acceptance Criteria:**

# Authentication Bug Fix - Quick Reference

## The Problem in 30 Seconds

**Symptom:** User logs in → immediately redirected back to login page (infinite loop)

**Root Cause:** Race condition between Zustand store hydration and AuthGuard redirect check

**Solution:** Wait for store hydration before checking auth status

---

## Files to Modify

| File | Change | Priority |
|------|--------|----------|
| `/apps/web/src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` | Use `setAuth()` instead of manual localStorage | 🔴 Critical |
| `/apps/web/src/lib/api.ts` | Get token from store, add refresh logic | 🔴 Critical |
| `/apps/web/src/components/layout/auth-guard.tsx` | Wait for hydration before redirect | 🔴 Critical |
| `/apps/api/src/modules/auth/routes.ts` | Add `/auth/me` endpoint | 🟡 Important |
| `/apps/web/src/stores/auth-store.ts` | Add `refreshTokens()` method | 🟡 Important |

---

## Implementation Checklist

### Phase 1: Critical Fixes (Do First)

- [ ] **Task 1.1:** Fix login page token storage
  - [ ] Import `useAuthStore`
  - [ ] Replace manual localStorage with `setAuth()`
  - [ ] Remove `audira-session` storage
  - [ ] Test: Login → no redirect loop

- [ ] **Task 1.2:** Fix API client token retrieval
  - [ ] Get token from Zustand store first
  - [ ] Add fallback to localStorage
  - [ ] Add `refreshAccessToken()` method
  - [ ] Handle 401 with refresh attempt
  - [ ] Test: API requests include token

- [ ] **Task 1.3:** Fix AuthGuard hydration
  - [ ] Wait for store hydration (100ms)
  - [ ] Check `isAuthenticated` from store
  - [ ] Add 5-second timeout
  - [ ] Show loading spinner
  - [ ] Test: Page refresh maintains session

### Phase 2: Important Improvements (Do Second)

- [ ] **Task 2.1:** Token refresh already in API client ✅
  - [ ] Verify 401 triggers refresh
  - [ ] Verify retry with new token works

- [ ] **Task 2.2:** Verify refresh endpoint works
  - [ ] Check `/auth/refresh` endpoint exists
  - [ ] Verify it validates refresh token
  - [ ] Verify it returns new token pair

- [ ] **Task 2.3:** Add refresh method to store
  - [ ] Add `refreshTokens()` method
  - [ ] Call API refresh endpoint
  - [ ] Update store with new tokens

### Phase 3: Session Validation (Do Third)

- [ ] **Task 3.1:** Add `/auth/me` endpoint
  - [ ] Requires authMiddleware
  - [ ] Returns user and tenant info
  - [ ] Validates session in database

- [ ] **Task 3.2:** Validate session on app load
  - [ ] Call `/auth/me` in AuthGuard
  - [ ] Clear auth if session invalid
  - [ ] Handle network errors gracefully

---

## Code Snippets

### Login Page - Before & After

**BEFORE (BROKEN):**
```typescript
localStorage.setItem("audira-auth", JSON.stringify(authData));
localStorage.setItem("audira-session", JSON.stringify({...}));
router.push("/dashboard");
```

**AFTER (FIXED):**
```typescript
const setAuth = useAuthStore((state) => state.setAuth);
setAuth({
  user: data.data.user,
  tenant: data.data.tenant,
  accessToken: data.data.accessToken,
  refreshToken: data.data.refreshToken,
});
router.push("/dashboard");
```

### API Client - Before & After

**BEFORE (BROKEN):**
```typescript
private getToken(): string | null {
  const stored = localStorage.getItem("audira-auth");
  const parsed = JSON.parse(stored);
  return parsed.state?.accessToken || null;  // May be undefined
}

if (response.status === 401) {
  this.handleUnauthorized();  // Immediately redirect
}
```

**AFTER (FIXED):**
```typescript
private getToken(): string | null {
  const token = useAuthStore.getState().accessToken;  // From store
  if (token) return token;
  // Fallback to localStorage
  const stored = localStorage.getItem("audira-auth");
  const parsed = JSON.parse(stored);
  return parsed.state?.accessToken || null;
}

if (response.status === 401) {
  const refreshed = await this.refreshAccessToken();  // Try refresh
  if (refreshed) {
    // Retry with new token
  } else {
    this.handleUnauthorized();  // Only redirect if refresh fails
  }
}
```

### AuthGuard - Before & After

**BEFORE (BROKEN):**
```typescript
const session = localStorage.getItem("audira-session");
if (!session && pathname !== "/login") {
  router.push("/login");  // May redirect before store hydrates
} else {
  setIsReady(true);
}
```

**AFTER (FIXED):**
```typescript
const checkHydration = async () => {
  await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 100));  // Wait for hydration
  
  const state = useAuthStore.getState();
  if (state.isAuthenticated && state.user && state.accessToken) {
    setIsReady(true);
  } else {
    router.push("/login");
  }
};
```

```

```

## Common Issues & Fixes

### Issue: Still Getting Redirect Loop

**Cause:** AuthGuard redirecting before store hydrates

**Fix:**
1. Add 100ms delay in AuthGuard
2. Check `useAuthStore.getState()` instead of localStorage
3. Verify store has `isAuthenticated: true`

**Debug:**
```typescript
// In AuthGuard useEffect
console.log("Store state:", useAuthStore.getState());
console.log("Is authenticated:", useAuthStore.getState().isAuthenticated);
console.log("Access token:", useAuthStore.getState().accessToken);
```

### Issue: Token Not Sent in Requests

**Cause:** API client not getting token from store

**Fix:**
1. Verify `useAuthStore.getState().accessToken` returns token
2. Check Authorization header is being set
3. Verify token is not empty string

**Debug:**
```typescript
// In API client getToken()
const token = useAuthStore.getState().accessToken;
console.log("Token from store:", token);
console.log("Token length:", token?.length);
```

### Issue: 401 Errors After Login

**Cause:** Token expired or refresh failed

**Fix:**
1. Check token expiry (decode at jwt.io)
2. Verify refresh endpoint works
3. Check refresh token is valid

**Debug:**
```typescript
// Decode token to check expiry
const payload = JSON.parse(atob(token.split('.')[1]));
console.log("Token expires at:", new Date(payload.exp * 1000));
```
